mapper.select: SELECT id, chapter_id AS chapterId, video_name AS videoName, video_url AS videoUrl, cover_image AS coverImage, duration, file_size AS fileSize, video_format AS videoFormat, resolution, playback_type AS playbackType, master_playlist_url AS masterPlaylistUrl, renditions, default_resolution AS defaultResolution, sort_order AS sortOrder, status, view_count AS viewCount, created_time AS createdTime, updated_time AS updatedTime FROM course_video WHERE id = #{id}
